## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, website development, and performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content publishing on track with 453 articles to be published by Saturday](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Website development facing challenges; Thiago seeking agency support for more effective implementation](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Performance metrics show increased impressions and clicks, with AI overviews becoming increasingly important](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [LLM referrals, particularly from ChatGPT, showing steady growth in traffic](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)

## Topics

### Content Publishing and Website Development

  - [453 articles scheduled for publication by Saturday](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Website development issues:](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
      - [Current Webflow CMS plan limitations preventing implementation of use case mappings](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
      - [Thiago expressing frustration with flaky developers, seeking agency support](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Industry use case pages:](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
      - [Staged in Webflow, pending review and expansion](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
      - [Design and content alignment with product capabilities needed](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Record highs in clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [Impressions increasing rapidly due to expanded AI overviews](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)
  - [Click-through rates for newer categories (e.g., AI agents for real estate) showing promise](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [LLM referrals:](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
      - [Steady increase in sessions, primarily from ChatGPT](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
      - [Referring to home page and blog articles across various topics](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [AI agent architects pillar:](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
      - [Proposing outlines piecemeal (2 per week) to reduce review burden](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [External link acquisition on schedule](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
  - [Thought leadership call transitioning to GrowthX for LinkedIn posting](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [JTBD (Jobs To Be Done) exercise scheduled with George and Jason](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)

### Website Redesign Priorities

  - [Thiago emphasizing need for agency to handle website development](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Desire for website to mirror product capabilities and agent structure](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
  - [Issues with current site:](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
      - [Messy categorization](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
      - [Broken links and navigation](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
      - [Inconsistent design elements](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=1605.0)

### Next Steps for Website Development

  - [Kaitlin to lead agency search and meetings](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [Vivek to check with Jason for additional agency contacts](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=1549.0)
  - [Create CMS-driven content library for agents that matches product offerings](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [Align website design with actual product functionality and agent structure](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=1964.0)

  - [Team to create CMS-driven content library for agents, matching product offerings](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [Vivek to check with Jason and George about web development solutions and JTBD pricing](https://fathom.video/share/aeWg9EZsdAU3fiGkcexjA8e6zq1JyFZb?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
